data.title: Former Rothschild Asia Head, Monique Chan, joins digital-asset wealth firm Metalpha as CEO of LSQ Capital Limited. (Characters: 110)
data.description: In Hong Kong on July 25, 2025, Metalpha Technology Holding Limited (Nasdaq: MATH), a prominent wealth management company specializing in digital assets, revealed the selection of Mrs. Monique Chan as the CEO of LSQ Capital Limited ("LSQ Capital"). This move signifies a strategic decision by the company to enhance its leadership team in the digital asset sector.

data.title: OSL Group raises $300M in equity financing for digital asset expansion, the largest in Asia.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Hong Kong, OSL Group (863.HK), a prominent regulated digital asset platform in Asia, revealed the successful conclusion of a significant equity financing round. The US$300 million raised marks the most substantial publicly disclosed equity raise ever seen in Asia's digital asset industry.

data.title: FLOKI price falls 5.59% despite bullish signals. $75.6M traded on Binance as RSI sits at 57.49.
data.description: Over the past day, the FLOKI price experienced a 5.59% decrease as it recorded a trading volume of $75.6 million on the Binance platform. Technical analysis revealed conflicting signals, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) measuring at 57.49, indicating a neutral stance.

data.title: Kyocera introduces TPA Series thermal printhead, printing at 250 mm/s, set to boost productivity in multiple industries.
data.description: In Kyoto, Japan, Kyocera Corporation recently announced the introduction of their latest innovation, the "TPA Series" thermal printhead. This cutting-edge technology boasts a remarkable printing speed of 250 mm/s, establishing a new industry standard for barcode label applications. The new product is anticipated to revolutionize various sectors such as distribution, food processing, and healthcare by significantly augmenting productivity levels. Kyocera plans to commence full-scale production of the TPA Series in August 2025. The company's President, Hideo Tanimoto, expressed enthusiasm for the potential impact of this advancement.

data.title: In 1996, Hulk Hogan shocked fans with a villainous turn, changing pro wrestling forever.
data.description: In 1996, Hulk Hogan, known for portraying an all-American hero, shocked fans by betraying his image in a controversial move.

data.title: Toncoin price stabilizes around $3.09, down 2.43%, with bullish MACD signals. TON RSI at 51.32 indicates possible breakout.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Toncoin is currently trading at $3.09, which reflects a decrease of 2.43% in value for the day. Despite this decline, the MACD signals indicate a bullish trend. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) for Toncoin is at 51.32, signaling a neutral position and possibly hinting at an upcoming breakout.

data.title: Bitcoin crashes under $116K causing bloodbath for 213,729 traders, $600M liquidated in 24 hours.
data.description: In the recent downturn of the cryptocurrency market, a staggering 213,729 traders were liquidated within the last day. This resulted in losses totaling close to $600 million.

data.title: SHIB sees 4.27% dip after token burn news, with 200 trillion tokens set for burning following 30% gain in July.
data.description: Despite the announcement of burning of 200 trillion tokens and an impressive 30% surge in July which broke key resistance levels, the price of SHIB has decreased by 4.27% bringing it to neutral RSI territory.

data.title: Hangzhou, China is becoming a global sports and conventions hub, with Belgian field hockey player Louise Dewaet praising the "wow" factor of the city's "Hangzhou umbrella"-shaped stadium during her visit for the FIH Hockey Pro League 2024.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Hangzhou, China, Belgian field hockey player Louise Dewaet expressed awe at the "Hangzhou umbrella" stadium while visiting for the FIH Hockey Pro League 2024. The venue's impressive size left her amazed as she described it as a massive structure that elicited a 'wow' reaction. Dewaet's first experience in the city brought her face-to-face with the remarkable stadium, showcasing the grandeur of the event.

data.title: BTC's dominance has grown for 3rd year, hitting 59.3% in 2025 per CoinGecko, showcasing its strengthening influence in market changes.
data.description: The dominance of Bitcoin in the market has been on a consistent increase since 2023 and has now reached 59.3% in 2025, as reported by CoinGecko. This uptrend highlights the expanding influence of Bitcoin amidst changing market conditions.

data.title: New Qwen3-Coder by Together AI: Advanced agentic coding model with integrated capabilities for engineering workflows, ready for quick deployment.
data.description: Together AI has launched the Qwen3-Coder, a new agentic coding model boasting advanced features to tackle intricate engineering workflows. The device is now ready for immediate deployment. This latest innovation promises to streamline coding processes and improve efficiency.

data.title: SUI price climbs to $3.62, surging 53% due to SEC's ETF review, approaching $4 with mixed signals.
data.description: The stock of SUI is currently valued at $3.62, experiencing a notable 53% increase subsequent to the Securities and Exchange Commission's examination of Canary Capital's proposed SUI ETF. Technical analyses indicate conflicting signals as the stock approaches significant resistance levels.

data.title: Coinbase's Ethereum Layer-2 solution, Base, stands out with high revenue, driven by priority fees and DEX usage, outperforming other leading rollups.
data.description: Coinbase's Base, a layer-2 solution on Ethereum, stands out for its revenue generation thanks to its distinct fee structure and decentralized exchange activity. It has surpassed competitors in the realm of top rollups. For further details, refer to the full article.
